interpretation: Derived tabular dataset size from the 60-second video.
ByteTrack vehicle candidates in the derived dataset.
Presence / occupancy proxy in the camera view; not a flow-rate crossing count.
Virtual counting line used for flow events.
Unique track crossings of the virtual counting line.
Pilot-window flow rate at the counting line.
Unique tracks with reliable near/mid speed above the screening threshold.
Rows with displayed speed from near/mid segments only.

Median near/mid displayed speed; far speeds are excluded from this policy indicator.

Upper quartile of reliable near/mid displayed speed.
Hypothetical 65 mph screening threshold; not a posted-speed claim.

interpretation: Track-level high-speed screening under the same hypothetical threshold.
All displayed speeds, including far segment; useful for context but less policy-safe.
Rows where projected speed exceeded the plausibility cap and was hidden as -- km/h.
Rows without enough calibrated trajectory history for speed display.
Coverage share in the least reliable speed zone.
Coverage share in the more policy-interpretable zones.
